result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Booking.com search results page for Phuket, showing 1 property found with filters applied (Wonderful: 9+, Resorts). One visible result card: YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Phuket: 1 property found”; “Wonderful: 9+”; “Resorts”; “YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店”; “Exceptional 9.6”; “Beach Nearby”; “3,150 feet from beach”; “Breakfast included”; “Per night $172”; “$1,034”; “6 nights, 2 adults”; dates “Tue, May 5 — Mon, May 11”.
selected_candidate:
YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店
constraint_evidence:
- Phuket location: supported (search/results header and URL show Phuket).
- Beach resort: supported/partial (Resorts filter visible; property shows Beach Nearby and distance from beach, but “beach resort” category not explicitly confirmed).
- Guest rating above 8.5: supported (visible rating 9.6, “Exceptional”).
- 6-night stay: supported (visible “6 nights” and dates May 5–May 11).
- From May 5, 2026: supported (visible date range starts Tue, May 5; URL also has checkin=2026-05-05).
- Available: supported (property card with “See availability”; result is shown as available).
- Exact resort type / beachfront resort: not_visible (no explicit “resort” in property name/card beyond filter).
- Price constraint: not_visible (no budget specified in task).
action_target:
Click target appears to be the left-side SVG icon near the lower-left area of the page, likely a map/overlay control or sidebar icon, not the property card.
success_signals:
Property list remains visible; filters and result card pe

result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Search results page on Booking.com for Phuket; banner says “Phuket: no properties found,” but one visible result appears in “Properties around Phuket” outside Phuket.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Phuket: no properties found”; filters “Wonderful: 9+”, “Resorts”, “Beachfront”; result “Amatara Welleisure Resort”; “Wonderful 9.0”; “Beachfront”; “6 nights, 2 adults”; “Per night $145”; “$973”; “Tue, May 5 — Mon, May 11”.
selected_candidate:
Amatara Welleisure Resort
constraint_evidence:
- Phuket location: supported (search field and page heading show Phuket).
- Beach resort / resort category: supported (filter chip “Resorts”; result name is a resort).
- Guest rating above 8.5: supported (visible rating 9.0, “Wonderful”).
- 6-night stay: supported (URL dates May 5 to May 11 and visible “6 nights”).
- Start date May 5, 2026: supported (visible date range starts Tue, May 5; URL checkin=2026-05-05).
- Availability for stay: not_visible (button says “See availability,” but no confirmed availability yet).
- In Phuket proper: contradicted/uncertain (page says “no properties found” and result is “outside Phuket,” 5.8 miles from Phuket).
- Beachfront amenity: supported (visible “Beachfront”).
- Price: supported (visible $973 total, $145 per night).
action_target:
Likely the visible result card / “See availability” for Amatara Welleisure Resort, or exit if concluding no exact Phuket property exists.
success_signals:
A result meeting all constraints in Phuket with rating >8.5 and

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent operated on the wrong target — wrong entity, wrong location, wrong category, or wrong page type — instead of the user's intended object.
items.fix_hint: Verify that the active page or selected entity matches the user's stated target before acting; recognize when the current context does not match and reorient.

args.task: navigate: Search for a beach resort in Phuket with a guest rating above 8.5, available for a 6-night stay from May 5, 2026.

evidence.claim: The search results at the end show a Phuket hotel listing with rating 9.6 and a 6-night stay from May 5 to May 11, 2026, which satisfies the core task constraints observed in the trace.
The final step is an exit/send-message action, indicating the agent stopped after reaching a result page rather than continuing to refine or select a clearer candidate.
A high-detail inspection of step 14 identifies the visible candidate as YUSU Hotel 羽宿酒店 with “Exceptional 9.6,” “Beach Nearby,” and “6 nights, 2 adults” for May 5–11, 2026.

The trace also contains an intermediate result page where a resort filter produces one visible property and strong rating/date matches, but the final result page is still consistent with successful search completion rather than a task failure.
No failure memory or prior validated eval case was needed to justify the verdict because the trace itself contains sufficient evidence of task completion.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 14 in detail
suggested_followups.message: Open the high-detail view of step 14 to verify the final result card and date/rating constraints.

suggested_followups.message: Find a similar validated success run for this Phuket search task to compare the completion pattern.
